phrases.english: Patience is the key to success.
phrases.context: Use this when encouraging someone to persevere through a difficult situation.

phrases.english: There is no power and no strength except with God.
phrases.arabic: لا حول ولا قوة إلا بالله.
phrases.pronunciation: La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.
phrases.context: Say this when facing a challenge that feels overwhelming or beyond your control.
Use this to find comfort and meaning after an unexpected or unfortunate event.

phrases.english: Seek knowledge from the cradle to the grave.
phrases.arabic: اطلبوا العلم من المهد إلى اللحد.
phrases.pronunciation: Utlubu al-'ilma min al-mahd ila al-lahd.
phrases.context: This phrase emphasizes the lifelong importance of learning and education.
Use this to highlight the importance of deeds over mere promises or talk.
